description: Stage 4 KPI supplement — missing metrics computed from existing data

lane_departure.reason: Current rig uses direct throttle control without lane-keeping. Ego follows straight trajectory to pedestrian — lane departure not applicable in current scenario design.
lane_departure.closure: Requires Autoware integration with lane-keeping planner. Planned for Phase 7.

max_longitudinal_accel_jerk.reason: Accel/jerk not directly logged. Speed reduction (mean_speed baseline→loop2) is used as a proxy for comfort cost. HAZ-01: 22.3→13.3 km/h (-40%) is the documented trade-off.
max_longitudinal_accel_jerk.closure: Add velocity logging per step and compute finite differences. Can be added to existing scripts without RunPod. See NR-add: log velocity array per run.

rosbag_recording.reason: Current rig uses Python CARLA API directly without ROS2. rosbag requires ROS2 topic pipeline.
rosbag_recording.closure: Requires Autoware + ROS2 bridge. Planned for Phase 7.

scenario_runner_criteria.reason: Pass/fail criteria implemented in Python scripts (collision flag, TTC threshold, distance threshold). Functionally equivalent to Scenario Runner criteria — same thresholds, same evaluation logic.
scenario_runner_criteria.closure: Formal Scenario Runner .criteria files would replace Python checks. Planned for Phase 7 with Autoware integration.

honest_gaps: Lane departure: not applicable in current scenario design (straight approach)
Accel/jerk: proxy only — speed reduction used as comfort cost measure
Scenario Runner .criteria: Python equivalent used — Phase 7 for formal
